creator: Cy.Schubert@uumail.gov.bc.ca
text:
I've searched the Net for Capt. Marshall USAF but have been unable to 
find him. FWIW.  I got this from a SHARE tape, IBM mainframe freeware, 
about 20+ years ago.  This probably explains why I cannot find Capt. 
Marshall.

I'm not sure whether pursuing this is worth the time and effort or 
whether I should email the USAF.  I've emailed SHARE (share@share.org) 
to see if they can give me some guidance.


Regards,                       Phone:  (250)387-8437
Cy Schubert                      Fax:  (250)387-5766
Team Leader, Sun/DEC Team   Internet:  Cy.Schubert@osg.gov.bc.ca
Open Systems Group, ITSD, ISTA
Province of BC

In message <200005242339.TAA10594@smtp13.bellglobal.com>, Tim 
Vanderhoek writes
:
> >
> > The "laws" were extracted from a S/370 Assembler program on a SHARE tape.
> >
> > The comments in the program:
> >
> > *---------------------------------------------------------------------*
> > *        'MURPHY'  THE OLE PHILOSOPHER              18 AUGUST 1988    *
> [...]
> > I will try to contact Capt. Marshall to get some history behind the
> > sayings.
> 
> Any update?
